message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All tasks complete — shutting down">
All 3 tasks are complete and pushed. Great work, team! Shutting down the session now. Thank you all for your reviews and collaboration.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Good session. All three tasks delivered cleanly:

- **Task #1**: Index page now has session-aware routing and HATEOAS-compliant navigation
- **Task #2**: Playwright e2e tests exercise the full hypermedia chain end-to-end
- **Task #3**: DoD codifies "no dead-end pages" and e2e testing requirements

Standing by for shutdown.
